examples: It's constantly being recycled through evaporation and condensation.
Except for condensation from a working air conditioner on a hot day, no car should ever drip anything, any time.
One of the most powerful of all weather systems, hurricanes are powered by the heat energy released by the condensation of water vapour.
It is these crystals, not aerosols, that act as condensation centres for further cloud formation.
These are the tiny airborne particles around which water droplets form, thus catalysing the condensation of clouds.
